description_long: This is a classic claw hammer with a robust, metallic head and a straight, elongated handle. The head features a flat striking face on one side for driving nails and a curved claw on the opposite side for prying and removing nails. The handle is smooth, slightly tapered, and appears to be made of a durable material, likely metal or a composite, matching the head in color and finish. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible embellishments, grip enhancements, or texturing on the handle. The hammer's surface is uniform in color, with a dark, matte finish that suggests resistance to wear and corrosion. There are no visible brand markings, damage, or additional accessories attached to the hammer.
description: A dark, matte-finished claw hammer with a smooth, straight handle and a classic curved claw head. The design is simple, robust, and unadorned.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, highlighting the curved claw and flat striking face.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the narrow width of the head and handle, with the claw and striking face aligned.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the curved claw and striking face, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the end of the handle and the head's width, with minimal detail of the claw.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, smooth metal handle with a uniform, matte finish and no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
